summary: Iteration 3 testing: Ghost Trigger (50/1s, auto-stop 90s), LIVE INFERENCE badge, 450px chart heights, HIGH CONTRAST tooltips (white bg/black text), neon green variable-width area chart Kalman line, schema mismatch dropdown, backend regex sanitizer. 19/19 backend tests passed. All 18 frontend checks passed.

minor.issue: @app.on_event('startup') is deprecated in newer FastAPI versions. No functional impact.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py: @app.on_event('startup') deprecated in FastAPI 0.93+ — functional, no immediate fix required
stream-batch resets Kalman (_kx = None) on every batch — causes discontinuous predictions. Mentioned in iter2 too.

live-inference-badge pulsing animation IS correctly implemented in index.css: `@keyframes liveInferencePulse` + `.live-inference-badge { animation: liveInferencePulse 0.75s ease-in-out infinite; }` — CORRECT

seed_data_creation: Backend restarted after tests to restore original dataset (n=10999, rho~0.82)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from SITI Enterprise Pitch Overhaul v3 verified: Ghost Trigger (50/1s, auto-stops 90 ticks in frontend ghostCountRef, not 90s), LIVE INFERENCE badge (pulsing animation in index.css), 450px chart heights, HIGH CONTRAST tooltips (white bg/black text), neon green dashed T+1 Kalman line (#39FF14, strokeDasharray='10 5', variable strokeWidth). Backend regex sanitizer strips '100kg'→100. Schema mismatch returns 400 with column name. $2.81M exposure always in top-right. All 3 streams/modes work: normal stream (100/10s), ghost trigger (50/1s), mutually exclusive. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_siti_iteration3.py
